message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor white
  BorderColor black
  ArrowColor black
  StereotypeBackgroundColor #98FB98
  StereotypeBorderColor black
}
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #98FB98
skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor black

class "FilingSystem" as FilingSystem {
  <<FilingSystem>>
  data_storage: bool
  storage_limited: bool
}

class "TechnicalMeasure" as TechnicalMeasure {
  <<TechnicalMeasure>>
  stereotype: GENERIC_STEREOTYPE
  category: TECHNOLOGY_CATEGORY
}

class "ProcessingSystem" as ProcessingSystem {
  <<ProcessingSystem>>
  confidentiality: bool
  integrity: bool
  availability: bool
  resilient: bool
  pseudonymity: bool
  data_minimization: bool
  redundancies: bool
  tested: bool
}

class "ProcessingTask" as ProcessingTask {
  <<ProcessingTask>>
  logged: bool
}

class "ProcessingLog" as ProcessingLog {
  <<Artifact>>
  name: bool
  contact_details: bool
  personal_data_category: bool
  data_storage_period: bool
  technical_measures: bool
  recipients: Array
}

class "Controller" as Controller {
  <<Controller>>
  processor: bool
}

class "Processor" as Processor {
  <<Processor>>
}

class "Recipient" as Recipient {
  <<Recipient>>
}

class "ThirdParty" as ThirdParty {
  <<ThirdParty>>
}

class "DataHandler" as DataHandler {
  <<DataHandler>>
}

class "DataSubject" as DataSubject {
  <<DataSubject>>
  minor: false
}

class "PersonalData" as PersonalData {
  <<PersonalData>>
  category: DATA_CATEGORY
}

class "SpecialPurpose" as SpecialPurpose {
  <<SpecialPurpose>>
  consent: CLASS consent
  employment_purpose: bool
  social_purpose: bool
  vital_interest: bool
  nonprofit_body: bool
  public_from_subject: bool
  legal_claim: bool
  public_interest: bool
  preventive_medicine: bool
  occupational_medicine: bool
  public_health: bool
  archiving: bool
  statistical_purposes: bool
}

class "Purpose" as Purpose {
  <<Purpose>>
  consent: CLASS consent
  contract_performance: bool
  controller_legal_obligation: bool
  vital_interest_protection: bool
  public_interest: bool
  legitimate_interest: bool
}

class "Consent" as Consent {
  <<Consent>>
}

class "ConsentAgreement" as ConsentAgreement {
  <<Artifact>>
  clear_purpose: bool
  unambiguous: bool
  affirmative_action: bool
  distinguishable: bool
  specific: bool
  withdrawable: bool
  freely_given: bool
}

FilingSystem --|> ProcessingSystem
TechnicalMeasure --|> ProcessingSystem : secures
Controller --|> ProcessingSystem : implements
ProcessingSystem --|> ProcessingTask : performs
ProcessingTask --|> ProcessingLog : manifests
Controller --|> DataHandler
Processor --|> DataHandler
Recipient --|> DataHandler
ThirdParty --|> DataHandler
DataHandler --|> PersonalData : receives
DataSubject --|> PersonalData : provides
PersonalData --|> SpecialPurpose
PersonalData --|> Consent : requires
Purpose --|> Consent
Consent --|> ConsentAgreement : manifests

@enduml
```
